ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: 68% Chicken with Added Water (82% Chicken, Water, Pea Fibre, Salt, Stabiliser: Triphosphates), 32% Breadcrumbs (Wheat Flour [Wheat Flour, Calcium Carbonate, Iron, Niacin, Thiamin], Wheat Starch, Rapeseed Oil, Salt, Egg White Powder, Yeast, Dextrose).
